pipeline_status.poller: QUIET (5th consecutive quiet poll). V51.1 stable. 69 WINs. No new WINs. 4 pending test windows, no expired.

expansion_integrations.note: 62 WINs received standardized post-hoc rebuttal sentences (T/D/V/O categories) by previous decider run (03:20Z). 3 O-category WINs (003, 011, 015) received verdict-review-flagged template. Tracker not updated by that run — corrected now.

WIN-048 detail_extra: Acknowledged dome's voluntary self-correction (>99.9% → 2-3σ, dated 2026-03-23). Explained why Misleading verdict is unchanged: (1) false dilemma survives, (2) corrected 2-3σ now within mainstream Planck range, (3) WIN-034 copper opacity at 160 GHz unaffected.

Analyst completed citation verification on workspace. DOI 10.1029/2019JB018855 resolves to Castellanos et al. 2020 (seismic noise, California) — wrong paper. Correct: 10.1029/2019JB017997 (Pappa et al. 2019, Antarctic lithosphere gravity). Two find/replace patches applied to WIN-067 detail_evidence. File rescued from FUSE workspace to git.
category-proposal-writeup already routed to curmudgeon (queue_id=1). No further action — integration awaits curmudgeon signoff on CAT-005 proposal package.

infrastructure_notes: ISS-693: partially resolved. EXP-059 and ISS-672-research rescued to git. Remaining workspace-only files are supplemental working notes (not pipeline-critical). ISS-693 severity downgraded to moderate.

ISS-672-research: Analyst confirmed dome changed n(r) coefficient from ~0.27 to 0.20. Our review has stale refractive index values in Part 1 and Part 7. Resolution flows through CAT-005/EXP-050 curmudgeon pipeline (already queued as queue_id=1).
